title: Delegation and accountability
summary: 9609 A Level — passing authority while retaining responsibility.
learningObjectives: Explain benefits and risks of delegation.

simpleExplanation.title: Let others decide
simpleExplanation.summary: Delegation assigns tasks and authority to subordinates. Managers remain accountable for outcomes.

sections.content: **Delegation** (7.1.3) contrasts **7.1.5 centralisation**. Use **case examples** of empowered teams.
